title: Possible enhancements to muxcover
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

` yosys -p "proc; techmap; opt; muxcover; stat"`

```
module mux_index_8_3 #(parameter N=8, parameter W=3) (input [N*W-1:0] i, input [$clog2(N)-1:0] s, output [W-1:0] o);
assign o = i[s*W+:W];
endmodule
```

Works when `W=2` or `W=4`...

## Expected behavior

3 x `$_MUX8_`

## Actual behavior

```
   Number of cells:                 36
     $_AND_                          5
     $_MUX4_                         2
     $_MUX8_                         2
     $_MUX_                         21
     $_OR_                           1
     $_XOR_                          5
```
